channel.title: Ali Zinsaz — Field Notes
channel.description: Essays on philosophy, AI, physics, and cosmology. Working drafts of ideas I'm still figuring out.

item.title: We taught rocks to think
item.description: Quantum mechanics, doped silicon, and the strange chain from Schrödinger's equation to language models. We didn't invent intelligence — we discovered it.
item.author: azinsaz@gmail.com (Ali Zinsaz)

item.title: Game theory is my operating system
item.description: A framework for decisions, lived from the inside. Iterated games, minimax regret, and why defection is almost always a mistake when reputation is on the line.
item.author: azinsaz@gmail.com (Ali Zinsaz)

item.title: Stardust and State Machines
item.description: A pacifist's argument for borderless computing. Rumi's reed flute, Linus Torvalds, and the long shift from administrative borders to genuinely irrelevant ones.
item.author: azinsaz@gmail.com (Ali Zinsaz)

item.title: God is Dead, but the Weights are Converging
item.description: Nietzsche meets gradient descent. Divine commandments and ML loss functions are structurally identical — so who designs the loss function?
item.author: azinsaz@gmail.com (Ali Zinsaz)

item.title: The Joy of Finding Things Out
item.description: Feynman, automation, and what I learned from building a cosmology RAG that I barely use. Automate the logistics — not the engagement.
item.author: azinsaz@gmail.com (Ali Zinsaz)

item.title: Algorithmic Anxiety: Kierkegaard in the latent space
item.description: On embeddings, sampling thresholds, and the leap of faith required to commit to any output. Kierkegaard's anxiety of freedom, expressed in high-dimensional space.
item.author: azinsaz@gmail.com (Ali Zinsaz)

item.title: A drop of water in the cosmic ocean
item.description: Khayyam, Russell, and the cosmological constant. The universe will be the same value with or without us. This is not depressing — it's clarifying.
item.author: azinsaz@gmail.com (Ali Zinsaz)
